# Requirements Brief Template

**Owner:** [Business Analyst](../octoacme-roles-and-personas.md#business-analyst)  
**Used by:** Business Analyst, Product Manager, Project Manager, Stakeholder Sponsor, Developers, QA/Test Lead  
**When to use:** Complete and share this brief when capturing requirements for a new feature, project, or significant change request. Review with stakeholders before handing off to the development team.

---

## Document Metadata

- Project / feature name:
- Business Analyst:
- Product Manager:
- Date created:
- Version:
- Status: `[ ] Draft` `[ ] Under Review` `[ ] Approved`

---

## 1. Problem Statement

> _Describe the business problem or opportunity this work addresses. Keep it concise (2–4 sentences)._

---

## 2. Business Objectives

> _What measurable outcomes should this feature/project achieve?_

| Objective | Success Metric |
|---|---|
| | |
| | |

---

## 3. Stakeholders

| Role | Name | Involvement |
|---|---|---|
| [Stakeholder Sponsor](../octoacme-roles-and-personas.md#stakeholder-sponsor) | | Approver |
| [Product Manager](../octoacme-roles-and-personas.md#product-managers) | | Decision maker |
| [Project Manager](../octoacme-roles-and-personas.md#project-managers) | | Delivery coordinator |
| [Business Analyst](../octoacme-roles-and-personas.md#business-analyst) | | Requirements owner |
| Development Team | | Implementer |
| [QA/Test Lead](../octoacme-roles-and-personas.md#qatest-lead) | | Quality reviewer |
| Other (list) | | |

---

## 4. Scope

### 4.1 In Scope

- _List features, functions, or processes included in this effort._

### 4.2 Out of Scope

- _List explicitly excluded items to prevent scope creep._

### 4.3 Assumptions

- _List any assumptions made during requirements elicitation._

### 4.4 Constraints

- _List technical, regulatory, budget, or timeline constraints._

---

## 5. User Stories / Requirements

> _List user stories or functional requirements. Use the format: "As a [role], I want [action] so that [benefit]."_

|---|---|---|---|
| REQ-001 | | `[ ] High` `[ ] Med` `[ ] Low` | |
| REQ-002 | | `[ ] High` `[ ] Med` `[ ] Low` | |
| REQ-003 | | `[ ] High` `[ ] Med` `[ ] Low` | |
